data.title: Dave Ramsey Weighs In On The 2024 Presidential Race With A Surprising Endorsement – Here's Who The Finance Expert Is Supporting
Why Pixie Dust Technologies (PXDT) Stock Is Down 30%
data.description: Pixie Dust Technologies shares are trading lower by 32% during Thursday's session. The company's board has decided to voluntarily delist its ADRs from NASDAQ and apply for SEC deregistration.

data.title: Garrett Motion Q3: Sales Plummet 14% Amid Weak Vehicle Demand, Cuts FY24 Topline Forecast
data.description: GTX stock down after weak Q3 sales and lowered FY24 guidance due to industry softness and competitive pressures. Gross profit margin increased, but EPS missed estimates.

data.title: Tesla Q3 'An Unexpectedly Good Quarter': 10 Analysts On Earnings, Margins, FSD, Robotaxis, More
data.description: 10 analysts share their highlights and key takeaways from Tesla's third-quarter earnings results and conference call.

data.title: AT&T Posts Mixed Q3, These Analysts Expect Pricing To Improve
data.description: AT&T delivers an EPS beat while missing Q3 sales expectations. Analysts maintain positive outlook on ARPU next year.
